text.title: Methodology Versioning and CHANGELOG Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Methodology Versioning and CHANGELOG end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: compute-diff
step.action: Compute schema diff, rule-id diff, body diff.

step.name: classify-bump
step.action: Apply semver-rules: any breaking? → MAJOR. Additive only? → MINOR. Wording? → PATCH.
step.decision-gate: If bump label inconsistent with diff (e.g. MINOR with removed rule), STOP.

step.name: emit-migration-plan
step.action: If MAJOR, draft migration plan per `migration-plan.md` covering every changed field + every renamed/removed rule.
step.decision-gate: If MAJOR and migration plan missing, BLOCK merge.

step.name: tag-and-merge
step.action: Recompute content_id; update AGENTS.md; validate with the script; merge.
